prompt: I'm building a SaaS for automated invoicing aimed at small businesses. Map the components and tell me what to build, buy, or outsource.

assertions.text: Every component has [visibility, evolution] coordinates in [0,1]
Strategic analysis gives build/buy/outsource recommendations per relevant component
Payment processing correctly placed at Product-to-Commodity stage (epsilon >= 0.6)
Cloud infrastructure correctly placed at Commodity/utility stage (epsilon >= 0.8)
Cites at least one specific Wardley gameplay by name (from the 61-play catalogue)
Caveat present that evolution is scenario not forecast
